ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., in development, deployed, archived) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES model_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model making the prediction */,
  "c_012" REAL /* Value of C_012 prediction */,
  "c_120" REAL /* Value of C_120 prediction */,
  "c_201" REAL /* Value of C_201 prediction */,
  "h_012" REAL /* Value of H_012 prediction */,
  "h_120" REAL /* Value of H_120 prediction */,
  "h_201" REAL /* Value of H_201 prediction */,
  "ground_truth" REAL /* Ground truth value associated with the prediction */,
  "choice" TEXT /* Choice made by the model (e.g., C or H) */,
  "confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the confidence level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "date_evaluated" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix data */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., training, cross-validation, test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the prediction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "previous_version" TEXT /* Previous version number of the model */,
  "current_version" TEXT /* Current version number of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model to which the version belongs */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES model_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation experiment */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., initial, cross-validation, final) */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Additional evaluation metrics */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_levels" (
  "confidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence level */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Level of confidence (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the confidence level */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Numerical threshold for the confidence level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation in the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confidence_id")
)
